name: NIKE, Inc.
description: NIKE, Inc. is a global leader in the design, development, marketing, and distribution of athletic footwear, apparel, equipment, and accessories. Headquartered near Beaverton, Oregon, the company is recognized worldwide for its iconic Swoosh logo and its commitment to innovation in sports performance. Nike operates a diverse portfolio of brands, including the Nike brand, Jordan Brand, and Converse. By leveraging cutting-edge technology and strategic athlete partnerships, Nike continues to influence global sports culture and fashion, maintaining its position as the world's largest supplier of athletic shoes and apparel.
